calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yulissa Zulaica for Rebecca Anzidei. Danielle Vogel also present.

Ms. Zulaica stated that there is an ancillary probate in Massachusetts, that 50% interest in the real property is owned by the Decedent, that there was notice of proposed action of the loan and that all of the Beneficiaries consented. Ms. Zulaica also stated that the Beneficiaries (three siblings) of Ruby's Estate and Leonard's Estate are the same with equal shares, that the promissory note is being distributed and will be owned by the Trust, and that her Client is willing to revise the amendment. The Petition for Final Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jones. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-23-2014 Continued To May-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Granted Per Written Order
